# Functional requirements

Every requirement carries a `Source` so its provenance is auditable
(safeguard 1). Priorities use MoSCoW (`M`/`S`/`C`/`W`) — the dialect that made
migrated packages all-`mvp=0` before plan 017 (field-evidence C14). MVP
requirements are traced in `../validation/traceability-matrix.md`.

| ID | Requirement | Priority | Source |
|---|---|---|---|
| FR-001 | Create a short link from a submitted long URL. | M | Intake brief, line 3 |
| FR-002 | Redirect a short link to its target URL. | Must | Intake brief, line 4 |
| FR-003 | Count and display click totals per link. | M | OQ-001 (resolved) |
